Container.Name: sphere86
Container.Overview: Sphere86: web UI for 86Box configs and Sunshine publishing. Replace OWNER with your GitHub user or organization in Repository and TemplateURL, or point Repository to any image built from this repo. Map a host folder to /data for SQLite, generated configs, and VM data. Set SPHERE86_SECRET to a stable random value of at least 32 characters.

Config.Name: Data
Config.Description: Persistent storage: database under /data/config, VM files under /data/vms, etc.

Config.Name: SPHERE86_SECRET
Config.Description: Credential encryption key (min 32 characters). Keep the same value across upgrades.

Config.Name: SHARE_ROOT
Config.Description: Must stay /data when using the Data path mapping above

Config.Name: PORT
Config.Description: Internal HTTP port (match Web UI port)
